resources.string: Enter your OpenChamber server URL to connect
Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
URL must have a valid hostname
HTTPS is required. HTTP is only supported for localhost connections.
This URL uses HTTP, which sends data unencrypted. This is fine for trusted networks like Tailscale or LAN, but not recommended for public servers. Continue anyway?
Could not load the page. Check your internet connection and try again.
